value.name: connectionName
value.helpTip: The name for the microsoft_onedrive_Client connection

value.name: httpVersion
value.helpTip: The HTTP version understood by the client

value.name: timeout
value.helpTip: The maximum time to wait (in seconds) for a response before closing the connection

value.name: compression
value.helpTip: Specifies the way of handling compression (`accept-encoding`) header

value.name: circuitBreaker_rollingWindow_requestVolumeThreshold
value.helpTip: Minimum number of requests in a `RollingWindow` that will trip the circuit.

value.name: circuitBreaker_rollingWindow_timeWindow
value.helpTip: Time period in seconds for which the failure threshold is calculated

value.name: circuitBreaker_rollingWindow_bucketSize
value.helpTip: The granularity at which the time window slides. This is measured in seconds.

value.name: circuitBreaker_failureThreshold
value.helpTip:
The threshold for request failures. When this threshold exceeds, the circuit trips. The threshold should be a
value between 0 and 1

value.name: circuitBreaker_resetTime
value.helpTip: The time period (in seconds) to wait before attempting to make another request to the upstream service

value.name: circuitBreaker_statusCodes
value.title: statusCodes
value.description: Array of HTTP response status codes which are considered as failures

value.name: validation
value.helpTip: Enables the inbound payload validation functionality which provided by the constraint package. Enabled by default

value.name: laxDataBinding
value.helpTip:
Enables relaxed data binding on the client side. When enabled, `nil` values are treated as optional, 
and absent fields are handled as `nilable` types. Enabled by default.
